long_description:
Discrepencies exist between the mzone yaml file and kubectl

The following nodes are listed in the mzone yaml file but not recognized by kubectl or not "Ready" in kubectl:

dal1-qz1-sr2-rk495-s06
Incident source: https://ibm-cloudplatform.slack.com/archives/C07L85XDY94/p1765064543228399 - Karan Bhatia
close_notes: Justin McCright from US team triggered the CFN (SHE) to remove the NNR and It's completed successfully
